title: [trustless://interop.landscape] Aram Kocharyan - TRAIN Protocol
description:
Introducing TRAIN Protocol. It’s an intent-based, cross-chain asset bridging protocol that requires no third parties — no oracles, no verifiers, no validators. It allows the User and the Solver to swap assets across chains using an advanced version of Atomic Swaps, with verification performed locally and trustlessly.

Talk given during day 2 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
